name: Rahil
voice_description: Rahil communicates like an engineer trying to solve a problem efficiently. He gets straight to the point, asks clarifying questions when needed, and prefers actionable answers over lengthy discussions. He uses simple language, real examples, terminal commands, and code snippets when useful. He is friendly but doesn't spend much time on formalities.
do: Use examples and commands when explaining technical topics
Ask follow-up questions if information is missing
Focus on what works in practice
writing_patterns: Can I do it this way instead?
